titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the International Syndicate Records
titlestmt.author: By Rosemary K. J. Davis

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday August 19, 2020 at 03:43

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The International Syndicate records, which span from 1904 to 1963, contain business records, artwork, printing plates, and other papers by or related to the business dealings of the International Syndicate. The records document the company's output, along with business dealings between newspapers, independent contractors, and International Syndicate. Artwork and printing mats make up the largest portion of the collection and are primarily comprised of crossword puzzles and children's page elements.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Boxes 98-108, 120-140, 142-151: Restricted fragile material. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Rulon-Miller Books on the Jockey Hollow Fund, 2017.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into six series: I. Artwork, 1904-1955. II. Children's page materials, 1910-1961. III. Crossword puzzles, 1910-1962. IV. Metal printing plates, 1914-1942. V. Business records, 1904-1963. VI. Scrapbooks, 1904-1941.

bioghist.head: International Syndicate
bioghist.p: International Syndicate was a Baltimore-based publishing concern that operated from 1910-1961. The company produced feature materials for newspapers, including crossword puzzles and content for children's pages.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: International Syndicate Records. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The International Syndicate records, which span from 1904 to 1963, contain business records, artwork, printing plates, and other papers by or related to the business dealings of the International Syndicate. The records document the company's output, along with business dealings between newspapers, independent contractors, and International Syndicate. Artwork and printing mats make up the largest portion of the collection and are primarily comprised of crossword puzzles and children's page elements.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The International Syndicate Records is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials within this series maintain the original physical organization found at time of acquisition with the exception of some oversized materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains original and reproduced artwork, including drawings and puzzles, used in the production of International Syndicate content.

did.unittitle: Drawings and artwork for children's pages
Drawings and artwork for children's pages
Drawings and artwork for children's pages
Copy cuts, original drawings, and proofs
Copy cuts, original drawings, and proofs

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials within this series maintain the original physical organization found at time of acquisition with the exception of some oversized materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains drawings, puzzles, and typescripts used in the production of International Syndicate "Children's Page" printing plates and mats. Also contains printed page proofs of completed "Children's Page" layouts.

did.unittitle: Junior puzzle folders and dot puzzles

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials within this series maintain the original physical organization found at time of acquisition with the exception of some oversized materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains printing mats and plates for crossword puzzles and solutions, original crossword puzzle designs and templates, and printed crossword puzzle proofs.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 100-110: Materials restricted due to weight and fragility. Consult Access Services for further information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials within this series maintain the original physical organization found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains metal printing plates for children's page elements produced by International Syndicate.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials within this series are organized by content type, then chronologically within that grouping.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains documentation related to the business dealings of International Syndicate including ledgers, correspondence, and printing samples.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 120-140, 142-151: Restricted fragile material. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scrapbooks contain print samples and page proofs of puzzles and articles created by artists and writers working for International Syndicate.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's daily picture puzzle service including items for Sunny Side of Life, special feature page, women's page, fashion page, war service, children's page, public interest, and comic service.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's comic service including items from the daily and weekly puzzle service, puzzles, people of note, children's page, weekly feature page, daily comic service, and fashion page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's comic service including items from the fashion page, children's page, holiday cartoons, weather reports, courses of balloons in international race, Special Feature page, home circle page, daily fashion service, people of note, and the daily and weekly puzzle picture services.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the children's page, columns on advertising, daily puzzle service, Christmas cartoon, weather reports, comic service, daily fashion, daily puzzle picture service, fashion page, and hints for motorists.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including maxims of merit, Mother Goose dot puzzles, review of the year cartoon, comic service items, Tanner daily puzzles, weekly children's pages, weekly fashion pages, weekly feature pages, and weekly puzzle series.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including the children's page, comic service, daily and weekly puzzle picture service items, special feature page, and weather reports.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the comic service, children's page, special feature page, home circle page, daily comic service, daily cartoon service, daily puzzle picture service, and weekly puzzle series.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, special feature page, daily comic service, daily puzzle picture service, Tanner daily puzzles, and daily and weekly puzzle series.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the comic service, weekly comic page, and children's page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the "page of fun," weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, weekly feature page, and the "Showem" feature.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly comic page, weekly home circle page, daily comic service, daily cartoon service, daily portrait service, heart and home talks, Tanner daily puzzles, daily line fashions, embroidery patterns, weekly puzzles, weather reports, and daily baseball service.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, and daily puzzles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the daily and weekly comic pages, weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, weekly feature page, and weekly home circle page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the daily fashions, Barbara Boyd columns, daily portrait service, daily line fashions, Tanner daily puzzles, Wellman's Komik Kolum, a foot of fun, embroidery patterns, weather reports, and Christmas-specific clippings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, weekly feature page, embroidery patterns, Tanner daily puzzles, weather reports, daily puzzles, and weekly comic page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly comic page, weekly children's page, weekly feature page, weekly home circle page, "Our daily laugh" page, daily "komik kinks" page, "Scoop, the cub reporter" page, daily puzzles, embroidery patterns, weather reports, and holiday cartoons.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, weekly feature page, advertising service, useful bird citizens, holiday cartoons, Tanner daily puzzles, camera news, daily puzzle service, jangling jingles, little nature talks, little talks on trees, helps for the home nurse, want-ad boosters, review of the year, and many others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, weekly feature page, advertising service, useful bird citizens, holiday cartoons, Tanner daily puzzles, camera news, daily puzzle service, jangling jingles, little nature talks, little talks on trees, helps for the home nurse, want-ad boosters, review of the year, and many others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, daily puzzle service, review of the year, advertisements, and crossword puzzles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, children's daily crossword puzzle story, crossword puzzles, junior puzzles, easy tricks, daily puzzle service, review of the year, and Christmas picture.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, crossword puzzles, weekly house plans, great outdoors, down the garden path, review of the year, and Christmas picture.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly fashion page, weekly children's page, smiles page, and crossword puzzles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly house plans page, who's who page, Christmas picture, and review of the year.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the smiles page, crosswords, weekly house plans page, junior puzzles, football training talks page, review of the year, and Christmas picture.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, crossword puzzles, and Jig-Saw Jr. puzzles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, crossword puzzles, weekly children's page, review of the year, and Tanner daily puzzles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, crossword puzzles, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the crossword puzzles, weekly children's page, junior puzzles, and review of the year page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the crossword puzzles, junior puzzles, weekly children's page, smiles page, and review of the year page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains clippings from International Syndicate's clipping service including items from the weekly children's page, crossword puzzles, smiles page, junior puzzles, and Noozie feature.
